race.comment: GANAJI WANGKATHE (4) was impressive on debut at this track and trip, storming home to be 0.6L off the winner when jumping the race favourite. This looks to shape similarly and he's expected to be better for the debut performance. Can go one better now. IL BELLO BEALS (1) is a 22-start maiden, though he's never far away and was just 0.7L off the winner most recently. The inside draw should see him get every chance and he goes well at this track and trip. Can be in the finish yet again. BLUE LUPIN (3) stuck on well at Albany last time out and looks better placed here coming back in trip slightly. He'll find this a little easier and Faithfull following him is a good push for his chances. ENCOSTA DE MONEY (7) missed narrowly two back before a sound performance at this track and trip last start. Worth including. GIGI GOGO (10) won't be far away with the blinkers going back on.
